zh.Spernall, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾斯白納爾
zh.Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾素德勒
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Durvassal於大約1272年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾庫頓時，他的父親Thomas Durvassal34歲，母親Margery Spermore31歲。他與Sybil Corbison在英國格盧斯特斯爾素德勒結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1347年之後在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓。

zh-hans.Spernall, Warwickshire, England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾斯白納爾
zh-hans.Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾素德勒
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Durvassal于大约1272年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾庫頓时，他的父亲Thomas Durvassal34岁，母亲Margery Spermore31岁。他与Sybil Corbison在英国格盧斯特斯爾素德勒结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1347年之后在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Durvassal was born about 1272, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Durvassal, was 34 and his mother, Margery Spermore, was 31. He married Sybil Corbison in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died after 1347, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Durvassal est né environ 1272, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Durvassal, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margery Spermore, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Sybil Corbison à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé après 1347, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Durvassal um 1272 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Durvassal 34 und seine Mutter Margery Spermore 31. Er hat in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England Sybil Corbison geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb nach 1347 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Durvassal è nato il circa 1272 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Durvassal, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margery Spermore, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Sybil Corbison nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì dopo il 1347, nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England.

ja.Spernall, Warwickshire, England: イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアスペルナル
ja.Coughton, Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトン
ja.Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリー
ja.lifeSummary: John Durvassalが約1272年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Durvassalは34歳，母Margery Spermoreは31歳であった。イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリーでSybil Corbisonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1347年以後にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Durvassal(이)가 대략 1272년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Durvassal(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Spermore(은)는 31세였다. 그는 영국 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 Sybil Corbison(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1347년 이후 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 사망했다.

mn.Spernall, Warwickshire, England: Spernall, Wæringscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Durvassal nasceu aproximadamente 1272, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Durvassal, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margery Spermore, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil Corbison em Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1347, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Durvassal родился около 1272 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Durvassal было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Spermore, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil Corbison в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер после 1347 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия.

sm.ABT 1272–after 1347: e tusa o le 1272–ina ua ma'ea le 1347

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Durvassal nació aproximadamente 1272, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Durvassal, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margery Spermore, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sybil Corbison en Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió después de 1347, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
